---
title: "hjhuang"
subtitle: "Research Homepage"
description: "Research homepage for hjhuang, focusing on intelligent wireless communications, RIS/STAR-RIS, ISAC, UAV/network optimization, and underwater acoustic channel modeling."
---

::: {.page-shell}

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
# hjhuang {.hero-title}

**Researcher in Intelligent Wireless Communications and AI-Driven Network Optimization**  
**智能无线通信与 AI 驱动网络优化方向科研工作者**

My research focuses on intelligent wireless communications, reconfigurable intelligent surfaces, integrated sensing and communication, and AI-driven optimization for next-generation networks.

我的研究主要聚焦于智能无线通信、可重构智能表面、通感一体化以及面向下一代网络的智能优化方法。

::: {.link-row}
[CV](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .primary}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/){.btn}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/){.btn}
[GitHub](https://github.com/hjhuang1989-svg){.btn}
:::
:::
:::

## About {#about}

I am a researcher working on next-generation wireless networks, with interests spanning RIS/STAR-RIS-assisted communications, integrated sensing and communication, secure and energy-aware transmission, UAV-assisted networking, and underwater acoustic channel modeling.

我是一名面向下一代无线网络的科研工作者，研究兴趣涵盖 RIS/STAR-RIS 辅助通信、通感一体化、安全与能量感知传输、无人机辅助组网以及水声信道建模。

## Research {#research}

- **Intelligent wireless communications and RIS/STAR-RIS.** Beamforming, resource allocation, and system optimization for RIS/STAR-RIS-assisted wireless networks.  
  **智能无线通信与 RIS/STAR-RIS。** 面向 RIS/STAR-RIS 辅助无线网络的波束成形、资源分配与系统优化。
- **Integrated sensing, communication, security, and power transfer.** Joint design for ISAC, secure communication, and wireless power transfer in future 6G systems.  
  **通感安全与能量传输一体化。** 面向未来 6G 系统的通感一体化、安全通信与无线能量传输联合设计。
- **AI and optimization for UAV/networked systems.** Learning-based control, trajectory planning, and optimization for UAV-assisted and dynamic communication environments.  
  **面向无人机与网络系统的 AI 优化。** 面向无人机辅助通信和动态网络环境的学习控制、轨迹规划与优化方法。
- **Underwater acoustic channel modeling and learning-based planning.** Channel-aware modeling, simulation, and decision-making for underwater/acoustic communication environments, including learning-based planning under complex propagation conditions.  
  **水声信道建模与学习型规划。** 面向水下/水声通信环境的信道感知建模、仿真与决策方法，关注复杂传播条件下的学习型规划与优化。

## Selected Publications {#publications}

1. **Paper Title One.** hjhuang, Coauthor Name. *Conference or Journal*, 2026.  
   **论文题目一。** hjhuang, Coauthor Name. *会议或期刊*, 2026.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/) · [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/) · [Code](https://github.com/hjhuang1989-svg)

2. **Paper Title Two.** hjhuang, Coauthor Name. *Conference or Journal*, 2025.  
   **论文题目二。** hjhuang, Coauthor Name. *会议或期刊*, 2025.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/) · [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/) · [Code](https://github.com/hjhuang1989-svg)

3. **Paper Title Three.** hjhuang, Coauthor Name. *Conference or Journal*, 2024.  
   **论文题目三。** hjhuang, Coauthor Name. *会议或期刊*, 2024.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/) · [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/) · [Code](https://github.com/hjhuang1989-svg)

## Projects {#projects}

- **UAV-TD-MPC2**  
  Learning-based planning and control for UAV-assisted dynamic communication environments.  
  面向无人机辅助动态通信环境的学习型规划与控制。  
  [Repository](https://github.com/hjhuang1989-svg/UAV-TD-MPC2)

- **STAR-RIS-Assisted ISAC**  
  System optimization for STAR-RIS-assisted integrated sensing and communication scenarios.  
  面向 STAR-RIS 辅助通感一体化场景的系统优化。  
  [Repository](https://github.com/hjhuang1989-svg/STAR-RIS-Assisted-ISAC)

## CV {#cv}

My latest CV is available here: [Download CV](assets/cv.pdf).  
我的最新简历可在此下载：[下载 CV](assets/cv.pdf)。

## Contact {#contact}

- Email: [hjhuang@hntou.edu.cn](mailto:hjhuang@hntou.edu.cn)
- GitHub: [github.com/hjhuang1989-svg](https://github.com/hjhuang1989-svg)
- ORCID: [0000-0000-0000-0000](https://orcid.org/)
- Google Scholar: [Profile link](https://scholar.google.com/)

Last updated: July 2026  
最后更新：2026 年 7 月

:::
